'''padudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zagaye|zagaye]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zagaye|zagaye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| padudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædidhith|pædidhith]] || [[word:pædidhij|pædidhij]] || [[word:pædidhish|pædidhish]] || [[word:pædidhi|pædidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padududhuth|padududhuth]] || [[word:padududhuj|padududhuj]] || [[word:padududhush|padududhush]] || [[word:padududhu|padududhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padudhuth|padudhuth]] || [[word:padudhuj|padudhuj]] || [[word:padudhush|padudhush]] || [[word:padudhu|padudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padufdhuth|padufdhuth]] || [[word:padufdhuj|padufdhuj]] || [[word:padufdhush|padufdhush]] || [[word:padufdhuf|padufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padudhuthu|padudhuthu]] || [[word:padudhuju|padudhuju]] || [[word:padudhushu|padudhushu]] || [[word:padudhuku|padudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padudhuth|padudhuth]] || [[word:padudhuj|padudhuj]] || [[word:padudhush|padudhush]] || [[word:padudhu|padudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padudhuthul|padudhuthul]] || [[word:padudhujul|padudhujul]] || [[word:padudhushul|padudhushul]] || [[word:padudhukul|padudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padudhuthuthu|padudhuthuthu]] || [[word:padudhujuju|padudhujuju]] || [[word:padudhushushu|padudhushushu]] || [[word:padudhuku|padudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padudhuthun|padudhuthun]] || [[word:padudhujun|padudhujun]] || [[word:padudhushun|padudhushun]] || [[word:padudhukun|padudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padudhuthuoro|padudhuthuoro]] || [[word:padudhujuoro|padudhujuoro]] || [[word:padudhushuoro|padudhushuoro]] || [[word:padudhukuoro|padudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
